General.Name: Jiyi Hsehld Intl Hldg Ltd
General.Description: Jiyi Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, supplies building and home improvement materials and furnishings in the People's Republic of China. The company operates in two segments, Sale and Distribution of Merchandise, and Provision of Interior Design and Building Engineering Services. It also engages in bulk commodity trading and estate management activities; and provision of online distribution and electronic marketing services, as well as sale of home decoration and electronic products. The company was formerly known as Jiyi Household International Holdings Limited and changed its name to Jiyi Holdings Limited in August 2020. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Meizhou, China. Jiyi Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Xinling Limited.
General.Address: No.2 Xianzi Middle Road, Meizhou, China, 514788
